## Our unique business model
We are structured as one team, one brand, one P&L with one standard of excellence and one unifying technology. Our oneBAL approach ensures all of our teams, including legal, IT, training, knowledge management, quality assurance, onboarding and client relationships, support one another to deliver exceptional service.
